gameTitle: Tactics Ogre: Let Us Cling Together

achievements.title: Hero of Golyat
achievements.description: Rescued Duke Ronway from imprisonment in Almorica Castle.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Corpse Dancer
achievements.description: Confronted the Necromancer Nybeth at Qadriga Fortress and put an end to his dark experiments.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Freedom of Choice
achievements.description: Choose the fate of Cistina at Arkhaiopolis of Rhime.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: There Is Blood on My Hands
achievements.description: Complete Chapter 1.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: The Merciful
achievements.description: Came to Arycelle's aid on the Xeod Moors, even though she had once sought to take your life.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Old Friends Quarrel
achievements.description: Defeat Vyce at Tynemouth and choose Arycelle's fate.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Liberation Front?
achievements.description: Choose if you want to help the Liberation Front.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Revolutionary
achievements.description: Make a decision about befriending the Liberation Front.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: The World Can Be Put to Rights
achievements.description: Complete Chapter 2 on the Chaos Route.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Piratesbane
achievements.description: Saved Xapan the Mercenary from pirates at Qadriga Fortress.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Hand of Justice
achievements.description: Defeated Galgastani High Commander Gatialo at Tynemouth Hill, and earn the title "Hand of Justice".
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: A Ronwey Decision
achievements.description: Heard out Sir Leonar's plot and made your decision about the future of the Resistance.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Leader of Men
achievements.description: Struck down Sir Leonar after he slew Duke Ronwey, becoming the leader of the Resistance.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Man of Deeds
achievements.description: Recaptured Coritanae Keep from the remnants of the Galgastani army to prevent the suffering of innocents.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Untarnished Hero
achievements.description: Defeated Sir Xaebos, commander of the remnants of the Galgastani army, at Brigantys.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: The Unflinching
achievements.description: Saved the blind swordsman Hobyrim from the Resistance on the Bahanna Highlands.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Arbiter of the Game
achievements.description: Slew Sir Leonar at Coritanae Keep and learned of Duke Ronwey's plot.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: He of Open Eyes
achievements.description: Slew Sir Leonar in a duel at Coritanae Keep and learned of Duke Ronwey's plot.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Dark Knight Scourge
achievements.description: Defeated Oz at Boed Fortress and put the Dark Knights to rout.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Chaotic Southron Liberator
achievements.description: Drove the Dark Knights from Phidoch castle and wrested control of the south of Valeria while on the Chaotic path
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Dark Knight Slayer
achievements.description: Slew the Dark Knight Oz at Boed Fortress and rescued Cerya.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Savior of the Dead
achievements.description: Saved Sir Dievold and Oelias from a horde of undead at Port Asyton.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Freer of Souls
achievements.description: Defeated the Necromancer Nybeth at Ndamsa Fortress and freed the soul of Sir Gildas.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Slayer of the Dying
achievements.description: Defeated Sir Xaebos, commander of the Galgastani army remnants, at Coritanae Keep.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Miracle Worker
achievements.description: Rescued Sir Leonar from Imprisonment in Qadriga Fortress.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Defender of Almorica
achievements.description: Drove the remnants of the Galgastani army out of hiding in Golyat.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Neutral Southron Liberator
achievements.description: Drove the Dark Knights from Phidoch castle and wrested control of the south of Valeria while on the Neutral path
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Man of Action
achievements.description: Complete the battle at Briganty's Great Hall and make a choice about the people of Galgastan.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: The Conqueror
achievements.description: Took Coritanae Keep and brought Hierophant Balbatos to justice.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Destroyer or Galgastan
achievements.description: Defeated Sir Xaebos, commander of the Galgastani army remnants, at Almorica Castle.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: He Who Walks in Darkness
achievements.description: Defeated the Bakram forces under the command of Dark Knight Ozma and rescued the blind swordsman Hobyrim at the Arkhaiopolis of Rhime.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Lawful Southron Liberator
achievements.description: Drove the Dark Knights from Phidoch castle and wrested control of the south of Valeria while on the Lawful path
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Man of Peace
achievements.description: Journeyed to Brigantys Castle, alone and unarmed, to parley with the Order of Philaha.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Blood-stained Hero
achievements.description: Journeyed to Brigantys Castle to parley with the Order of Philaha, but you were unable to avoid bloodshed.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: A Sister's Fate
achievements.description: Complete the battles at Barnicia Castle and choose Catiua's fate.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Bringer of Change
achievements.description: Defeat Brantyn at the Royal City Of Heim and decide the future of Valeria.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Ruler of Valeria
achievements.description: Allowed Catiua to die before the final battle at the Royal City of Heim.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Dynast-King Slayer
achievements.description: Defeat Dorgalua, the Dynast-King, as he returned from the Abyss.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: The Tragic King
achievements.description: Finish the main campaign with the 'Bad/Assassin Ending'.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: The Bloodbound
achievements.description: Finish the main campaign with the 'Neutral Ending'.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Savior of Valeria
achievements.description: Finish the main campaign with the 'Good Ending'.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: He Who Walks the Deeps
achievements.description: Discovered the secret door on the third level of the palace of the dead, allowing access to the depths below.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: A Pleasure, to Be Sure!
achievements.description: Defeat Nybeth at Level 5 of the Palace of the Dead.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Bodies Are Fleshy, Weak Things...A Nuisance
achievements.description: Defeat Georges at Level 22 of the Palace of the Dead.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Dragon Lord?
achievements.description: Defeat Belzebuth at Level 41 of the Palace of the Dead.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Unquenchable Desire
achievements.description: Defeat Belzebuth at Level 74 of the Palace of the Dead.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Necromancer Scourge
achievements.description: Defeated the Necromancer Nybeth who had embraced death and become a lich.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: He Who Visited the Pirate's Graveyard
achievements.description: Decide what to do with the treasure of the Pirate's Graveyard.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Slayer of the Earth Watch
achievements.description: Defeated the Guardian Nathalork and Complete the Earth Sanctum.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Slayer of the Fire Watch
achievements.description: Defeated the Guardian Ifrit and Complete the Fire Sanctum.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Slayer of the Ice Watch
achievements.description: Defeated the Guardian Lygenstzel and Complete the Ice Sanctum.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.description: Defeated the Guardian Xolotl and Complete the Lightning Sanctum.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Slayer of the Water Watch
achievements.description: Defeated the Guardian Tlaloc and Complete the Water Sanctum.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Slayer of the Wind Watch
achievements.description: Defeated the Guardian Vainateya and Complete the Wind Sanctum.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.description: Complete initial battle of CODA episode 1 by defeating all enemies.

achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Concord Warrior
achievements.description: Complete Chapter 1 without using Chariot Tarot or retreating
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Concord Knight
achievements.description: Complete any Chapter 2 route without using Chariot Tarot or retreating
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Concord Lord
achievements.description: Complete any Chapter 3 route without using Chariot Tarot or retreating
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Concord King
achievements.description: Complete Chapter 4 without using Chariot Tarot or retreating
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: The Just
achievements.description: Reached the Altar of the Beyond in the Palace of the Dead without using Chariot Tarot or Retreating
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Light Unto the Dark
achievements.description: Reached and completed the Chamber of the Seal in the Palace of the Dead without using the Chariot Tarot or retreating
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Man of No Regrets
achievements.description: Reached and completed the Central Garden in the floating ruins of San Bronsa without using the Chariot Tarot or retreating

achievements.title: He Who Stops the Wheel
achievements.description: Completed all Coda Episodes without using Chariot Tarot or Retreating

achievements.description: Complete Chapter 1 without any units being incapacitated

achievements.description: Complete any Chapter 3 route without any units being incapacitated
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.description: Complete main campaign without any units dying - Death Counter cannot reach 0

achievements.description: Complete Chapter 1 without any units being slain - No HP to 0

achievements.description: Complete any Chapter 2 route without any units being slain - No HP to 0

achievements.title: Quick Walk Through the Gardens
achievements.description: Take the shortest route to the Twixt Of Heaven and Earth in the hanging gardens.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Tour the King's Garden
achievements.description: Fight all battles in the Hanging Gardens.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: He Who Devoured the Depths
achievements.description: Complete all battles at Pirate's Graveyard.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Phorampa Open to Hunting
achievements.description: Complete all battles at Phorampa Wildwood.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Garden of Incredible Power
achievements.description: Complete all battles at San Brosa Ruins.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Like the Dead
achievements.description: Complete all battles at Palace of Dead Floors 1-25 - Last battle must be completed all the way through without loading a quick save
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Enticed with the Dead
achievements.description: Complete all battles at Palace of Dead Floors 26-50 - Last battle must be completed all the way through without loading a quick save
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Obsessed with the Dead
achievements.description: Complete all battles at Palace of Dead Floors 51-75 - Last battle must be completed all the way through without loading a quick save
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: In Love with the Dead
achievements.description: Complete all battles at Palace of the Dead 76-100 with last battle being at Altar Of Beyond - Last battle must be completed all the way through without loading a quick save
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Sick of the Dead
achievements.description: Complete all battles at Palace of Dead Floors 101-115 with last battle being at the Chamber of the Seal with Rodrick - Last battle must be completed all the way through without loading a quick save
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Command and Conquer
achievements.description: Steal a Hagiaknight Mark.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Forgive Thy Sins
achievements.description: Steal an Abuna's Mark.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Tale of Mann Maceux
achievements.description: Steal a Reaver ring from the Grim Reaper.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Take This Curse
achievements.description: Obtain a named Cursed weapon.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Power of Gods
achievements.description: Obtain at least one of each of the God Weapons:  Notos, Boreas, Zephyros, and Euros
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Dragonslayer
achievements.description: Equip Denam with the Dragon Equipment: Wyrmscale Helm, Wyrmscale Armor, and Ancient Dragon Scale shield
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Ji'ygla's Range
achievements.description: Equip Denam with Ji'ygla's Equipment: Ji'ygla's Bow, Ji'ygla's Darkcoat, and Ji'ygla's Bracers
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Battle with Ogre's
achievements.description: Equip Denam with the Ogre Equipment: Ogre Blade, Ogre Helm, and Ogre Armor
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Evil Deeds
achievements.description: Equip Denam with the Dark Equipment: Dagda's Hammer, Skull Mask, and Thanatos Armor
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Heroes of Valeria
achievements.description: With only Denam and Catiua defeat Martyn and Balbas at the Hanging Gardens
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: The Ogre Battle Wage You Now
achievements.description: With full roster defeat all Doppelganger's then defeat the dark lord. No HP to zero.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: The Ogre Battle Wage You Now Part Deux
achievements.description: With full roster defeat all Doppelganger's then defeat the Dark King in CODA. No HP to zero.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Fear of the Dark
achievements.description: Obtain a Heretic's Mark and Change Catuia into a special class.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Hellish Blessing
achievements.description: Convert a character to a Lich.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Heavenly Blessing
achievements.description: Convert a character to a Divine Knight.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Faraway Heights
achievements.description: Obtain all Music selection in the Warren Report - Need to open up Warren report music menu
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Heavenly Communion
achievements.description: Craft a Heaven's Fork.
achievements.author: siouxerskate

achievements.title: Secret of the Master
achievements.description: Obtain all crafting recipes.
achievements.author: siouxerskate
